dev.template: Start the development server for XIV Venue Manager

build.template: Run the production build and check for errors

lint.template: Run ESLint to check for code issues

security-audit.template:
Run a security audit on this codebase. Check for:
1. Dependency vulnerabilities (npm audit)
2. Exposed secrets in code
3. Missing security headers
4. SQL injection risks
5. XSS vulnerabilities

Use the @security-auditor agent for detailed analysis.

deploy.template: Show me the commands to deploy to Vercel for production

db-push.template: Push Prisma schema changes to the database
